experiment: Main vs hg_edits Branch Comparison (Same inference.py)
methodology: Using regular inference.py (deterministic/heuristic-based) on both branches

branches.main: 09ea410 - minor improvements and inference openai updated

gpt-3.5-turbo.note: All models score identically on main

gpt-4o.note: All models score identically on main

gpt-5.4.note: All models score identically on main

comparison_summary.finding: hg_edits creates slight model variance while main has zero variance
comparison_summary.hg_edits_characteristic: Models diverge slightly - SOTA (0.9700) vs Weak (0.9645)

key_insights.main_branch: Deterministic heuristics produce identical results across all models
key_insights.hg_edits_branch: Changes introduce slight variance - SOTA model performs better than weak models
key_insights.score_drop: All models score lower on hg_edits (-0.56% to -1.13%)
key_insights.separation: hg_edits achieves 0.55% separation vs 0% on main
key_insights.interpretation: hg_edits changes made the environment harder or more nuanced
